meaning: vt.指配不适当的角色,角色分配不适当
examples: The young actor was badly miscast as Lear / in the role of Lear.
Kirkland has power in both hands, but he believes he has been miscast as a brawler .
An arcane spell caster is unjustly accused of starting a devastating fire with a badly aimed (or miscast) spell.
The script feels mechanical and obvious, and, except for Gyllenhaal, the movie is disastrously miscast.
The error led to thousands of votes being miscast during an eight-minute period after the pair performed a duet.
